title: Alan Aronowitz
compiled_truth: Alan Aronowitz is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2002-06-21), Alan Aronowitz sent 214 and received 2091 emails, totalling 2305 interactions. Top correspondents: [Sara Shackleton](people/sara-shackleton) (65), [Mark Taylor](people/mark-taylor) (58), [Mark Haedicke](people/mark-haedicke) (23), [Tana Jones](people/tana-jones) (22), [John Viverito](people/john-viverito) (21). Mailbox folders observed: archive, deleted_items, inbox, resumes_for_recruiting.
